description: src/app/api/explore/blocks/route.ts currently returns hardcoded stub heights for trait filters (palindrome, nakamoto, sub-100k, patoshi, etc.). Replace with calls to bitmap-index GET /api/bitmaps?traits=...&page=...&limit=... Add BITMAP_INDEX_URL to .env and next.config. Map existing filter param names to bitmap-index trait names (e.g. 'punks' -> 'pristine_punk', 'epic-sat' -> 'epic_sat'). Depends on bitmap-index API being live (bitmap-index-vbf).
title: Replace stub block filter data in /api/explore/blocks with bitmap-index API

description: src/app/page.tsx passes HOME_MARKET_ROWS from lib/mock-data.ts to HomePageClient. Replace with a server-side fetch to bitmap-index GET /api/traits to get real trait counts per category. Map trait counts to listedPercent/volume placeholders until marketplace listing data is wired. Depends on bitmap-index API being live (bitmap-index-vbf).
title: Replace HOME_MARKET_ROWS mock data with bitmap-index trait counts on homepage
